'''danozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zacusca|zacusca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zacusca|zacusca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| danozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dænezheth|dænezheth]] || [[word:dænezhej|dænezhej]] || [[word:dænezhesh|dænezhesh]] || [[word:dænezhe|dænezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:danonozhoth|danonozhoth]] || [[word:danonozhoj|danonozhoj]] || [[word:danonozhosh|danonozhosh]] || [[word:danonozho|danonozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:danozhoth|danozhoth]] || [[word:danozhoj|danozhoj]] || [[word:danozhosh|danozhosh]] || [[word:danozho|danozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:danofzhoth|danofzhoth]] || [[word:danofzhoj|danofzhoj]] || [[word:danofzhosh|danofzhosh]] || [[word:danofzhof|danofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:danozhotho|danozhotho]] || [[word:danozhojo|danozhojo]] || [[word:danozhosho|danozhosho]] || [[word:danozhoko|danozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:danozhoth|danozhoth]] || [[word:danozhoj|danozhoj]] || [[word:danozhosh|danozhosh]] || [[word:danozho|danozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:danozhothol|danozhothol]] || [[word:danozhojol|danozhojol]] || [[word:danozhoshol|danozhoshol]] || [[word:danozhokol|danozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:danozhothotho|danozhothotho]] || [[word:danozhojojo|danozhojojo]] || [[word:danozhoshosho|danozhoshosho]] || [[word:danozhoko|danozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:danozhothon|danozhothon]] || [[word:danozhojon|danozhojon]] || [[word:danozhoshon|danozhoshon]] || [[word:danozhokon|danozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:danozhothoro|danozhothoro]] || [[word:danozhojoro|danozhojoro]] || [[word:danozhoshoro|danozhoshoro]] || [[word:danozhokoro|danozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
